title: The Sublimation Point
description: Use the clues to decide which ingredient reveals the most information when consulted in the Royal Society book.

hints.text: The Royal Society book reveals whether an ingredient's alchemical is Solar or Lunar. Consulting a confirmed ingredient gives no new information. The most useful choice is the ingredient whose Solar/Lunar nature is most uncertain — the one most evenly split between the two possibilities.

Still uncertain (Solar / Lunar candidates both possible):
  ing7: 444 Solar / 636 Lunar alchemicals still consistent ← most balanced
  ing1: 434 Solar / 646 Lunar alchemicals still consistent
  ing5: 434 Solar / 646 Lunar alchemicals still consistent
  ing4: 424 Solar / 656 Lunar alchemicals still consistent
  ing6: 424 Solar / 656 Lunar alchemicals still consistent
  ing2: 692 Solar / 388 Lunar alchemicals still consistent
  ing3: 700 Solar / 380 Lunar alchemicals still consistent
  ing8: 768 Solar / 312 Lunar alchemicals still consistent
Most informative ingredient to consult: ing7.
